svg.title: MEV Forensics monorepo package dependency diagram
svg.desc: Shows how apps/api and apps/web depend on packages/agent, which depends on packages/claude and packages/tenderly, and how all packages depend on packages/shared.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in apps/api for the MEV forensics project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in apps/web for the MEV forensics project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in packages/agent for the MEV forensics project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in packages/shared for the MEV forensics project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in packages/claude for the MEV forensics project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in packages/tenderly for the MEV forensics project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in packages/rpc for the MEV forensics project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in packages/pool-math for the MEV forensics project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in packages/keeperhub for the MEV forensics project?')
sendPrompt('How does the claude package interact with the Anthropic API?')
